html-doc Skill 文件结构crossRef 示例
crossRef — 文件交叉引用图Skill 文件关系
组件演示

crossRef — 文件交叉引用图

展示主文档如何引用其他文件，高亮词到目标之间自动绘制箭头。

Skill 文件关系

html-doc/SKILL.md
YAML Frontmatter
---
name: html-doc
description: Create readable HTML documents
  from simple JSON when Markdown is too flat.
metadata:
  short-description: HTML docs for human review
---
Markdown
# HTML Doc

Create readable HTML documents by writing
simple JSON and rendering it with the bundled script.

## Workflow

1. Identify the information shape.
2. Create a JSON file. Open references/schema.md
   when exact fields or examples are needed.
3. Render it:

   node scripts/render-html-doc.mjs \
     examples/component-showcase.json \
     dist/component-showcase.html

4. Open the HTML and verify layout.
html-doc/references/schema.md
# HTML Doc JSON

The agent writes JSON.
The renderer creates the final HTML.

## Top Level

{
  "meta": { "title": "...", "glossary": {} },
  "content": [...]
}

## Component Choice

| Need           | Use              |
| -------------- | ---------------- |
| key numbers    | metrics          |
| data series    | chart            |
| wide comparison| matrix           |
| file cross-ref | crossRef         |
html-doc/examples/component-showcase.json
{
  "meta": {
    "title": "Component Showcase",
    "subtitle": "All available components"
  },
  "content": [
    { "type": "hero", ... },
    { "type": "metrics", ... },
    { "type": "chart", ... },
    { "type": "matrix", ... },
    { "type": "crossRef", ... }
  ]
}
已复制
